prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the **CZCA 1.8L TSI (EA888 Gen3)** engine, targeting 300 HP and 380 Nm on 98 RON fuel with a **Garrett GT2867R turbocharger** (0.63 A/R turbine housing, 56 trim compressor wheel) and **APR High-Flow Carbon Fiber Intake System** (part # INA-002200). Includes **NGK 97506 (ILKAR7L11)** iridium spark plugs gapped at 0.024" and **APR Catted Downpipe** (2.5" diameter, 300-cell catalytic converter) for optimized spool and emissions compliance.

**KW Clubsport Coilovers (Variant 3)** with **Polo GTI-specific spring rates (Front: 120 N/mm, Rear: 100 N/mm)** and **KW-specific top mounts** (part # 10030001) for aggressive camber adjustment (-3.5° front, -2.8° rear). Paired with **Whiteline Adjustable Front Sway Bar (24mm, 3-way adjustable)** and **SuperPro Polyurethane Bushings (Front Control Arm Bushings: SPF2300K, Rear Subframe Bushings: SPF2301K)** to eliminate compliance under load.

**Brembo GT 6-Piston Front Brake Kit (09.9454.75)** with **355x32mm two-piece rotors** and **Ferodo DS2500 brake pads**, paired with **Goodridge G-Stop Stainless Steel Brake Lines** and **Motul RBF 660 Racing Brake Fluid** for fade resistance. Rear brakes upgraded to **Brembo 1-Piston Calipers (08.5255.10)** with **280x18mm vented rotors** and **Ferodo DS1.11 pads** for balanced braking.
estetica: **Rieger Tuning Polo GTI MK5 Widebody Kit (Front: 30mm per side, Rear: 40mm per side)** in **PPG Volkswagen Pure White (Code: 2K2K)** with **custom carbon fiber front splitter (Rieger part # 5G0075681A-CF)** and **rear diffuser (Rieger part # 6C0071503B-CF)**. Includes **OEM+ side skirts (VW part # 6C0075074B9B9)** and **custom rear overfenders (Rieger part # 6C0807403C-CF)** for aggressive stance.

**OMP HTE-R Carbon Fiber Steering Wheel (350mm diameter, part # 1111710)** with **VW Polo GTI-specific airbag delete module (000038000A)** and **NRG Innovations Quick Release Hub (part # SRK-200B)**. Interior further enhanced with **Recaro Sportster CS (VW-specific mounting brackets, part # 7H0884015A)** in **Nappa leather with red Alcantara inserts (VW part # 6C0051829B)** and **Schroth Profi II 4-Point Harnesses (part # 41400.00)** for track use.

**Hella Pagid LED Taillights (part # 1EL0536051A)** with **custom sequential turn signals (VW-specific coding via OBDeleven Pro)** and **Morimoto XB LED Headlights (part # 45160)** with **Lux H11 5500K bulbs**. Exterior lighting completed with **Osram Night Breaker Laser H7 bulbs (64210NL-HCB)** and **Philips Ultinon Pro6000 LED Fog Lights (12953UNIX2)** for improved visibility. Wheels: **BBS CH-R II (8.5x18 ET35, part # 08508800001)** in **Gloss Black with red lip**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 (215/35/18)** for maximum grip.
